topStories.title: US Will Earn Lot Of Money When Oil Prices Go UP: Donald Trump Amid Iran War
topStories.description: Oil prices have been spiralling to new highs, even reaching $120 per barrel in the previous days, as war has ravaged West Asia.

topStories.title: US Stocks: Bumble shares soar 40% as investors swipe right on AI-powered reboot
topStories.description: Bumble shares jumped more than ​40% in early trading ​on Thursday after the company posted upbeat fourth-quarter revenue and ​unveiled an AI-driven overhaul of its apps to lure back younger users.

topStories.title: In first message as Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei seeks US base closures, vows Minab school attack revenge
topStories.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei vowed to continue attacks on Gulf neighbours and use leverage to close the Strait of Hormuz. He promised to avenge those killed in the war.

dailyNews.title: Kharge blames Centre for ‘security collapse’ after attack on Farooq Abdullah
dailyNews.description: Congress president alleges plot to target senior leaders, says law and order has broken down since J&K lost Statehood; Nadda calls it a “murderous attack” but accuses Opposition of politicising the issue

dailyNews.title: Muslim Personal Law Board condemns Supreme Court petition challenging Islamic inheritance law
Senate Republicans plan vote on SAVE America Act despite low chances of passage amid Democratic opposition
dailyNews.description: Republicans must decide whether to continue pressing the voting bill or shift focus to economic policies aimed at winning over voters.

dailyNews.title: Trump on rising oil prices: ‘US makes money when oil prices go up, but stopping Iran’s nuclear ambitions top priority’
dailyNews.description: Meanwhile, Bloomberg has reported that the Trump administration is set to suspend Jones Act to tame oil prices.

dailyNews.title: Words of defiance: Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei lashes at US - Al Jazeera
dailyNews.description: Words of defiance: Iran’s new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei lashes at US  Al Jazeera

dailyNews.title: Iran's "Hunt Down US Servicemen" Warning If Trump Attacks Electricity
dailyNews.description: Iran's security chief, Ali Larijani, threatened to target power grids in the region if the United States attacked the Islamic republic's supplies.

dailyNews.title: To protest or not to protest: Iranians face Hamlet's dilemma as Islamic Republic warns of strict action amid conflict
dailyNews.description: As war with Israel and the US intensifies, many Iranians face a dilemma: protest or stay silent. Officials warn of severe punishment for demonstrations, while exiled prince Reza Pahlavi urges resistance. Rights groups say past protests saw thousands killed.

dailyNews.title: Get Cylinders Or Cut Menu: Family's Tough Choice As Iran War Hits Weddings
dailyNews.description: The growing tensions between the US, Iran, and Israel have begun to impact local households and the wedding season.

dailyNews.title: Epstein files: Convicted sex offender used modelling agencies to lure girls from South America, says report
dailyNews.description: More than six years after Jeffrey Epstein’s death, new testimonies from Brazilian women allege they were lured with modelling offers linked to his network. Authorities in Brazil are now investigating possible recruitment operations as newly released US files renew scrutiny of Epstein’s associates.

dailyNews.title: Honda scraps 3 EVs planned for the US, blaming tariffs and Chinese competition
dailyNews.description: The Japanese automaker said the change of plans will cost it up to $15.7 billion.

dailyNews.title: Hardeep Puri says no shortage of LPG, crude, petrol and diesel, but urges use of alternate fuels for... | Top points
dailyNews.description: Oil minister Hardeep Singh Puri issued a detailed response on Thursday to questions related to LPG “shortage” and the disruption to global energy supply in the wake of the ongoing conflict in West Asia between Iran, Israel and the US. Here's what he said:

dailyNews.title: US Navy not ready: Team Trump's U-turn on oil tanker escort through Hormuz
dailyNews.description: US Navy not ready Team Trumps Uturn on oil tanker escort through Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Oil prices unlikely to hit $200 a barrel, US energy chief says
dailyNews.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright said on ​Thursday global oil prices are unlikely to hit $200 a barrel even as crude tankers remained stalled in the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. and ‌Israeli war ⁠with Iran ⁠widened.

dailyNews.title: Xi-Trump meeting: US launches trade probe against China over ‘unfair’ practices; will it worsen ties?
dailyNews.description: The US has launched Section 301 trade investigations targeting China ahead of a Trump–Xi summit. Washington cites concerns over industrial overcapacity and forced labour, while analysts say tariffs remain Trump’s key negotiating tool. China’s exports continue to surge despite global criticism.

dailyNews.title: Questions mount for Hegseth over possible US involvement in strike on Iranian school
dailyNews.description: Democrats have written to ask the defence secretary whether the US was responsible, but he says the issue is being investigated.

dailyNews.title: Paraglider makes emergency landing on packed ski slope after spending hours in the air
dailyNews.description: Footage shows a paraglider making an emergency landing on a crowded ski slope at a South Korean resort. No injuries were reported despite busy conditions.

dailyNews.title: Shooting in Old Dominion University hall injures two; gunman dead
Clyburn, 85, bucks Democrat generational revolt with bid for 18th term in Congress
dailyNews.description: Jim Clyburn announces bid for 18th term in Congress at age 85, defying calls for generational change as other Democratic leaders choose to retire

dailyNews.title: ICE busts human smuggling ring that kidnapped family, sexually assaulted pregnant woman
dailyNews.description: ICE agents busted a South Texas human smuggling ring, resulting in the arrests and sentencing of gang bangers who kidnapped a family and sexually assaulted a pregnant mother.

dailyNews.title: Kidnapped child found alive after years hidden under fake name: police
dailyNews.description: Kidnapped girl found safe in North Carolina after nearly six years missing from California. The now-11-year-old was discovered living under a fake name in Washington County.

topStories.title: Team USA star Matthew Tkachuk brushes off criticism for visiting Trump
topStories.description: Matthew Tkachuk, a Team USA Olympic gold medalist, spoke on "Hangout with Sean Hannity" about the criticism the team received for visiting President Donald Trump.

topStories.title: Trump’s Tour of States Is About More Than the Midterms
topStories.description: Beyond talking about the economy and voters’ hardships, the president is showing that he still has control over the Republican Party.

topStories.title: Trump Endorses Jake Paul, Who Isn't Running for Office
topStories.description: The president called Mr. Paul, a boxer and provocative influencer, a “great guy” and predicted that he would run for an elected position.

topStories.title: Tensions rise in Congress over Trump's elections bill and DHS funding lapse
topStories.description: President Trump is still pushing for Congress to pass the SAVE America Act, which could affect millions of American registered voters. Also, lawmakers are still at odds over funding for the Department of Homeland Security. CBS News' Taurean Small reports.

topStories.description: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.

dailyNews.title: Trump-backed SAVE America Act will get a Senate vote next week, Thune says
dailyNews.description: Advocates of the voter-ID bill have pressed the Senate for months to call a vote on the controversial legislation.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration has scaled back oversight of student loan servicers, congressional watchdog finds
dailyNews.description: The Department of Education has scaled back its oversight of student loan servicers, a new report from the nonpartisan Government Accountability Office finds.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration launches Section 301 trade probes into Mexico, China, EU, others
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court, in a 6-3 ruling, said President Trump was not authorized by the International Emergency Economic Powers Act, IEEPA, to impose tariffs.

dailyNews.title: Trump to tap strategic oil reserve to bring down gas prices
dailyNews.description: With Iran attacking tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, President Trump and several other countries are tapping emergency reserves to bring down oil prices. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump expects military to do 'more of the same' in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump expects military to do 'more of the same' in Iran

dailyNews.title: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'
dailyNews.description: Trump calls U.S. operations in Iran 'a little excursion'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine awaits White House sign-off on US drone production deal
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy says he is awaiting White House approval for a major drone production agreement proposed by Kyiv last year

dailyNews.title: Former NFL players don’t want Trump using them to sell the Iran war
dailyNews.description: The White House released a video on X using footage of Ray Lewis, Chad Ochocinco and other former NFL players juxtaposed with war footage.
